next_steps: Obtain fasting serum vitamin A, retinol, and retinol-binding protein levels
Obtain serum B12, folate, copper, zinc, and vitamin E levels
Initiate ophthalmology consultation to assess for corneal ulceration and xerophthalmia severity
Start immediate high-dose vitamin A supplementation (oral or intramuscular based on severity)
Consult nutrition/dietetics for comprehensive assessment of restrictive eating patterns and caloric/micronutrient intake
Review complete blood count and metabolic profile to check for hematologic signs of deficiencies (e.g., anemia/neutropenia related to copper/B12)
